title: mumei reliability log entry
description: One append-only line in .mumei/specs|plans/<feature>/reliability-log.jsonl. Produced by hooks/post-task-event.sh on TaskCompleted; consumed by /mumei:assure and /mumei:present.

feature.description: feature_dir_key — REQ-N-<slug> for spec vehicle, bare <slug> for plan vehicle. Equal to .mumei/current at append time.

wave.description: tasks.md Wave number ("1" / "2" / ...). Empty string "" for plan vehicle (no Wave concept).

task_id.description: tasks.md task ID ("1.2" / "2.3"). For plan vehicle, the TaskCreate task index ("1" / "2" / ...).

trial_n.description: Prior trial count for same (feature, wave, task_id) tuple, plus one (1-origin).

pass.description: True when the latest verify-log.jsonl row for the same task shows pass.

ts.description: UTC timestamp at append time, ISO 8601 with literal Z suffix.
